title: stelin album
intro: Stelin album, also known as Stellaria media, is a type of flowering plant commonly found in lawns and fields. It is a small, annual plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family and is native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. Stellaria media can be prepared as a herbal tea or used in tinctures, and is also used in homeopathy to treat a range of health issues, including fever, sore throats, and digestive problems.
